title: Bless The Name

sections.label: Intro
lines: Step into the light, lift your voice to the skies,
Feel the rhythm of grace where the heavens arise.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Come, all who gather in the still of the night,
Raise your hands, let your hearts take flight.
From the house of stars to the edge of the sea,
Sing the song of love, set your spirit free.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, the dawn breaks through like a melody,
Every soul ignites in harmony.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Bless the name, let the fire glow,
In the shadow of wings, let the praises flow.
Day and night, where the pure streams run,
Lift your hands, bless the Holy One.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Underneath the stars where the faithful stay,
Voices rise like an endless wave.
Feel the warmth of grace in the cool night air,
Every heart aligned in a whispered prayer.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, the dawn breaks through like a melody,
Every soul ignites in harmony.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Bless the name, let the fire glow,
In the shadow of wings, let the praises flow.
Day and night, where the pure streams run,
Lift your hands, bless the Holy One.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: From the mountains high to the depths below,
Every heart cries out where the blessings grow.
In the quiet night or the blazing sun,
All creation sings of the Righteous One.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Bless the name, let the fire glow,
In the shadow of wings, let the praises flow.
Day and night, where the pure streams run,
Lift your hands, bless the Holy One.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Step into the light, let your soul be found,
Where the song of love is a holy sound.

epigraph: which by night stand in the house of the LORD
styleNote: Rising Strings · Percussive Accents · Vibrant And Uplifting
